title: Deus DAO - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by liquidation of user positions on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls liquidate() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unexpected flash loan activity followed by liquidation of user positions
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls liquidate() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx
summary: A flash loan attack was used to manipulate the balance of the Solidex USDC/DEI pool, resulting in user positions becoming insolvent and being liquidated. The attacker then repaid the flash loan and made a profit of ~$3M.
